notes: The claude adaptor (v1.1.2) exposes a single public operation, `prompt`, which calls the Anthropic Messages API (POST /v1/messages) through the @anthropic-ai/sdk (client.messages.create). The spec centers on POST /messages and its Message response shape, and adds companion endpoints from the same API surface (count_tokens, Models API, Message Batches API) so the mocker has useful seed collections. Response schemas are simplified: content blocks, tools, tool_choice, thinking, and detailed usage sub-objects are modeled loosely (additionalProperties/oneOf) rather than exhaustively. Auth is via x-api-key + anthropic-version headers. Streaming (SSE) responses are not modeled.
